query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m') as month, deliveryCity, SUM(courseAmount) as totalRevenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'paid' AND classDate IS NOT NULL AND classDate >= '2025-03-13' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m'), deliveryCity ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m') LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m') as month, deliveryCity, SUM(courseAmount) as totalRevenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'paid' AND classDate IS NOT NULL AND classDate >= '2025-03-13' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m'), deliveryCity ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(classDate, '%Y-%m') LIMIT 5;
